# Step 7 — Get Text Endpoint

> **Epic**: E1.3.5 | **Task**: T1.3.5.3.1.1
> **Depends on**: Step 1 (InstapaperClient must exist)
> **Parallelizable with**: Step 9 (import tests)

Shared context: [E1.3.5 Instapaper Context](../instructions/e1.3.5-instapaper-context.instructions.md)

---

## Task

Add the `getBookmarkText()` method to `InstapaperClient`. This endpoint returns raw HTML (not JSON), so it needs different response handling than other endpoints.

---

## File to Modify

### `lib/features/content/services/instapaper_client.dart`

Add this method to `InstapaperClient`:

```dart
/// Fetch the processed text-view HTML for a bookmark.
///
/// Returns the article's HTML content as a UTF-8 string.
/// The response is raw `text/html`, not the standard JSON format.
///
/// Throws [InstapaperApiException] with error code 1041 if the
/// bookmark requires an Instapaper Premium subscription.
/// Throws [InstapaperApiException] with error code 1550 if the
/// service cannot generate text for this URL.
Future<String> getBookmarkText({required int bookmarkId}) async {
  final response = await _signedPost('/api/1/bookmarks/get_text', body: {
    'bookmark_id': bookmarkId.toString(),
  });

  if (response.statusCode == 200) {
    return response.body;
  }

  // Error responses are standard JSON format
  final error = _parseError(response);
  throw error ?? InstapaperApiException(
    errorCode: response.statusCode,
    message: 'Failed to fetch article text: HTTP ${response.statusCode}',
  );
}
```

---

## Verification

```bash
dart analyze lib/features/content/services/instapaper_client.dart
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `getBookmarkText(bookmarkId:)` returns raw HTML string on 200
- [ ] Error responses parsed as `InstapaperApiException`
- [ ] Handles 1041 (Premium required) and 1550 (text generation error)
- [ ] Request body includes `bookmark_id` as string
- [ ] `dart analyze` reports zero issues
- [ ] Dartdoc comment on public method
